subject: ASAP: AI Engineer – AI/ML – Fintech
body:
Hi,

I'm writing to share a new consultant request that has just come in.

CLIENT: Kredify
ROLE: Senior AI Engineer
START: 2025-05-25
DURATION: 18 months
LOCATION: Göteborg / remote
RATE: 1050 SEK/h

The team works primarily with AI/ML, AWS, Hugging Face and LangChain.

Key requirements:
• AI/ML
• AWS
• Hugging Face
• LangChain

Don't hesitate to reach out with any questions.

Best regards,
Alicia Strand
Talent Scout
ByteForce
Tel: +46 70 788 90 12
